prompt: A fun colorful kids advertisement poster. An adorable young girl age 7 in a bright pink summer dress jumps joyfully beside a giant oversized pink and yellow sunglasses frame 3x her height with flower details on the sides, "SUNNY KIDZ" written in bubbly font on the frame. Bright sunshine yellow background with floating daisies butterflies and rainbow confetti. Big bubbly rounded typography "SUNNY KIDZ" in hot pink and yellow filling the background. Tagline bottom: "See the fun in everything." Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, fun kids summer commercial style, bright cheerful outdoor sunshine lighting.
